---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Yanhao Wang - Teaching"
---

<link rel="stylesheet" href="style.css" type="text/css">
<br>

### <span style="color:Black;font-family:'Arial';font-size:18pt;font-weight:bold;line-height:2em">As independent lecturer:<span>

G300 (undergraduate): [Introduction to Managerial Economics and Strategy](https://kelley.iu.edu/faculty-research/courses/course.html?ID=BUS-G300-63) ($\times$ 2, Fall 2020 & 2021)

<br>

### <span style="color:Black;font-family:'Arial';font-size:18pt;font-weight:bold;line-height:2em">As teaching assistant:<span>

X530 (master's): [Economics of Healthcare Analytics](https://oneill.indiana.edu/doc/masters/mshm-curriculum.pdf) ($\times$ 5, Spring 2020--2024)<br> 
G303 (undergraduate): [Game Theory for Business Strategy](https://kelley.iu.edu/faculty-research/courses/course.html?ID=BUS-G303-64) (Fall 2018) 

<br>

<!--
<span style="color:Navy;font-family:'Arial';font-size:13pt;font-weight:bold"><u>[Teaching Evaluation](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1l5h_yFHahG93Va268Km_xyEwjq0hn8A0/view?usp=sharing)</u><span>
-->
